name: NFR 5: Delete User Account (Soft Delete via Deactivation) — Performance Test
description: Verify the API performance and correctness when soft-deleting a user by updating status to "deactivated" using PATCH under concurrent load.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target value: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Validate post-condition (data integrity): deactivated users must not appear in /users/active.
